text:
Market today: Tech is facing headwinds from earnings misses by IBM and Tesla, signaling potential weakness across your concentrated tech and chip names. Rising fuel costs also point to broader economic pressure.

Your holdings: SOXL (-36.74%) and SPAL (-55.27%) are leveraged ETFs with massive losses, both well past their listed stops. Remember, margin amplifies these drops. QQQ (-1.3%) and QQQI (-3.67%) are on TRIM status.

Watch: Closely monitor your leveraged positions, SOXL and SPAL, for immediate action. Also, keep an eye on how broader tech reacts to recent earnings misses.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your deeply underwater leveraged positions and respect stops on your general tech exposure.
plays: SOXL and SPAL are leveraged and significantly past their stops with heavy losses. Strongly consider exiting these positions to protect capital and margin.
For QQQ and QQQI, respect their stops at 670 and 52 respectively, given the 'TRIM' status and tech sector headwinds.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
